Our Story

Good Food, Made Fresh Every Day

Kalakkal Kitchen Hotel — Vandavasi to Chetpet Road, Kozhipuliyur X Road, Near Suraj School. Fresh food open 1 PM to 11 PM daily.

From crispy dosas and biriyani to kothu parotta, fresh juices and snacks — everything made fresh with traditional Tamil recipes.

கலக்கல் கிச்சன் ஹோட்டல் — தரமான சமையல், புத்தம் புதிய உணவு. Kozhipuliyur X Road, Suraj School அருகில்.
